successCriteria.scenario: HTTP + browser happy path: local app returns bootstrap without calendarId/events, score UI shows Drive loading or explicit Drive state, and app shell loads versioned app.js
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: HTTP bootstrap: appTitle Band Room, googleReady false, hasCalendarId false, firstRealCellHasEvents false, versioned app.js true, static Cache-Control no-cache. Browser mobile DOM: activeTab 참석표, tabs 참석표/악보/체크보드, fileList Google 연결 안내, hasEventForm false, hasEventChips false, errorLogs empty. Screenshots saved under .omo/ulw-loop/evidence/.

successCriteria.scenario: Drive edge state: when Google or Drive folder is not connected, the score list shows an explicit setup/error message instead of silently failing or showing stale calendar data
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Drive edge: renderScores now distinguishes googleReady false, missing GOOGLE_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID, empty folder, and Drive error. /api/scores without token returns [] when folder ID is absent locally; browser fileList shows 'Google 연결을 완료하면 악보 폴더의 파일을 불러옵니다.' No stale Google Calendar text or imported event chips are present.

successCriteria.scenario: Regression: attendance check board still renders available counts/member toggles and npm run check exits 0
successCriteria.capturedEvidence: Regression/build: npm run check passed; git diff --check clean except CRLF warnings; browser mobile DOM shows selected date panel with 0/7명 가능 and member toggles; bootstrap month has 30 real day cells with availability, availableCount, capacityClass and no events field.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ulw-loop plan in .omo/ulw-loop/019ef7f8-0567-78a0-8c93-bcb2ec408c96/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omo/ulw-loop/019ef7f8-0567-78a0-8c93-bcb2ec408c96/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
